title: Annual safety + curriculum re-validation pass
context: Safety guidance, official hazard classifications, and curriculum standards evolve over time. A guide that was accurate at publication may become outdated if safety agencies update their guidance, if a material is reclassified, or if curriculum standards are revised. The re-review cadence defined in ops-022 specifies that guides must be reviewed at minimum annually and immediately after any incident report or change in official guidance. This task represents one such annual re-validation pass across all published guides, with staleness flags resolved and review logs updated.
objective: Conduct a structured annual safety and curriculum re-validation pass across all published guides. For each guide: check the safety block against current official safety guidance (relevant national science-teacher-association safety guidelines, occupational-safety and poison-control authorities); check the curriculum alignment codes and links against any updates to the mapped frameworks; verify the exclusion check is still current; update the review log with the re-review result and new lastReviewed date. Flag any guide that has changed safety status for immediate action (hard-invalidation if a safety risk is identified).
acceptanceCriteria: All published guides are re-reviewed in this pass; none are skipped

Each guide's safety block is checked against current official safety guidance sources (national science-teacher-association guidelines, occupational-safety authorities, poison-control authorities); any discrepancy from current guidance is documented and resolved
Each guide's curriculum alignment codes and links are checked against the current state of the mapped frameworks; any broken links, deprecated codes, or revised standards are updated
The exclusion check is re-run for each guide against the current hard exclusion list; any guide that now trips an exclusion is flagged for immediate hard-invalidation
Each guide's review-log entry is updated with: re-review date, reviewer name, sources checked, exclusion re-check result, any changes made or divergence decisions
The lastReviewed date is updated on every re-validated guide

Any guide where a safety issue is identified is hard-invalidated (purge + force refresh via the content-version manifest) immediately, before the rest of the pass completes; the incident-report channel is notified
A summary report of the re-validation pass is committed to the repository: guides reviewed, changes made, any guides flagged, and the next re-review due date
output: A pull request recording updated review-log entries, updated lastReviewed dates, and a summary report for the annual safety + curriculum re-validation pass across all published oer-science-labs guides.
